welcome.title: Welcome to AI Bot! 🤖
welcome.description: I can help you with questions, writing, coding, and much more — powered by the latest AI models.
welcome.capabilities:
👋 Hi! I'm your AI assistant.

I give you universal access to the best neural networks in one place.

Here you can:
• chat with ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, DeepSeek and other models
• create images
• generate videos
• work with documents
• write texts
• write code
• create songs and creative content

🎁 Free:
100 questions per week.

Choose an action below.
subscription.check_text: To use the bot, please subscribe to our channel.
subscription.not_subscribed: You are not subscribed to the channel yet. Please subscribe and try again.
menu.title: Main Menu
chat.type_message: Send a message to start chatting...
chat.limit_reached: You have reached the daily limit of {limit} free messages. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited access.
chat.premium_required: This model requires a Premium subscription.
chat.error: Failed to generate a response. Please try again.
history.title: My Chats
history.empty: You have no chats yet. Start a new conversation!
history.confirm_delete: Delete this chat? All messages will be permanently removed.
history.enter_title: Enter a new title for the chat:
models.title: Select AI Model
models.premium_required: This model is available for Premium subscribers only.
premium.title: ⭐ Premium
premium.description: Unlock unlimited messages and exclusive AI models.
premium.features:
✅ Unlimited messages
✅ Premium AI models
✅ Priority support
premium.payment_success: Payment successful! Premium is now active. 🎉
premium.already_active: You already have an active Premium subscription.
settings.title: ⚙ Settings
settings.reset_done: Settings have been reset to defaults.
help.title: ❓ Help
help.text:
This is an AI assistant powered by the latest language models.

Available commands:
/start — Start the bot
/menu — Main menu
/new — New chat
/help — Help
/i — Internet search

For support, contact: {support}
help.premium_info: Premium gives you unlimited messages and access to exclusive AI models.
search.no_results: No relevant results found for your query.
search.error: Internet search failed. Please try again.
dev.text: 💻 Development Here you can: • write and improve code • find bugs • explain logs • do code review • work with projects • use AI for development Separate coding modes are coming soon. For now, just send your task as a message — I'll help as an AI assistant.
errors.daily_limit: Daily limit reached: {limit} messages. Come back tomorrow or upgrade to Premium.
errors.premium_required: This feature requires a Premium subscription.
errors.provider_unavailable: AI service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
